summary.intent: Address 4 findings (1 P1, 3 P2) surfaced by a Codex review pass (pass 7) against the PinInput and NumberInput components in the ars-ui worktree.
summary.outcome: All 4 findings fixed, 1995 tests passing, clippy clean, no orphan snapshots; changes committed and pushed as round 7.

repo: PinInput.on_props_changed must emit SetProps before SetValue so length updates are applied before value assignment.
NumberInput aria-valuenow must be clamped to the component's min/max range, not emitted raw.
Both NumberInput.on_input_keydown and PinInput.on_cell_keydown must return false (prevent default) when the component is disabled or readonly.
The project uses a Codex multi-pass review loop; each pass produces prioritized threads (P1/P2) that are batched and resolved before the next push.

code.finding: on_props_changed event ordering fix: SetProps must be emitted before SetValue. on_cell_keydown must short-circuit and return false when disabled or readonly.
aria-valuenow must be clamped to [min, max] before being set. on_input_keydown must return false when the component is disabled or readonly.

workflow: Codex review threads are fetched via gh CLI and batched into a single fix session to minimize push/CI round-trips.
Test output required multiple bash retries (background task timing) before a synchronous run was used to get reliable results.
The formatter runs automatically and must be acknowledged before committing; noted mid-session without causing issues.
Validation sequence: unit tests → snapshot orphan check → clippy → xci-fast → commit + push.

friction: Background test output was not immediately available; required multiple polling bash calls before switching to a synchronous test run.
Formatter ran mid-session unexpectedly, requiring an acknowledgment step before proceeding.
